name: Delicious and 'Good for You' Spam Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 large fresh cucumbers, all green skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the SPAM.
2. Dice the tomatoes.
3. Dice the peeled cucumbers.
4. Bring 12 eggs to boil and set aside for 20 minutes.
5. Add diced vegetables and cooked eggs to a large bowl.
6. Add the creamy French Dressing.
7. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
8. Salt and pepper to taste.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
10. Serve at room temperature or allow flavors to mix further before serving.
